channel.title: SDL on Romulus Crisan
channel.description: Recent content in SDL on Romulus Crisan

item.title: Hello SDL
item.author: cromica@gmail.com (Romulus Crisan)
item.description: I now have two weeks since I joined SDL as a Language Platform Evangelist Developer. Almost everyone asked me what does that mean and what will I do so I decided that I better explain here in detail. If you are looking for a general definition of the position you can find one on wikipedia but it won't help you too much. In order to understand it better you really need to understand the context.
